name: America Needs You Fellows Program
amount: Two-year intensive mentorship and career programming; limited direct scholarships vary by chapter

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen, permanent resident, or DACA
eligibility.other_requirements: First-generation college student; low-income; must be located in a program city (New York, New Jersey, Chicago, San Francisco Bay Area); must commit to two-year program participation

stackable_notes: Any direct financial awards stack with institutional aid. Primary program value is intensive mentorship, professional development, and career services over two years — not primarily a cash scholarship.
notes: ANY is fundamentally a mentorship and career launch program for first-gen college students rather than a traditional scholarship. Fellows receive a volunteer mentor, career coaching, and professional network access over two years. Program operates in specific metro areas only — eligibility requires living near a chapter. The career preparation value often exceeds any direct cash award.
